message:
fix(gui): correct quad index winding order in build_quad_indices

Swap V_BOT_RIGHT and V_BOT_LEFT in the second triangle of each quad
to produce consistent counter-clockwise winding for both triangles.
Update the corresponding unit test expectation to match the corrected
index order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
